HIGH.subject: Memory leak suspected
HIGH.body: Our monitoring tools have flagged abnormal memory growth patterns in one of the running application services. This behavior is consistent with a potential memory leak. The engineering team has been notified and is reviewing application logs and memory profiling data.
HIGH.reason: Potential memory leak detected in application service, requiring immediate attention from the engineering team.

HIGH.subject: Endpoint response time degraded
HIGH.body: One of your monitored API endpoints is responding above the acceptable latency threshold. Increased response times may be caused by database bottlenecks, resource contention, or unoptimized query patterns. Our team is investigating the root cause of the degradation.
HIGH.reason: The email indicates a potential system issue with degraded endpoint response time, requiring immediate attention.

HIGH.subject: Cron job failure detected
HIGH.body: A scheduled cron job failed to complete successfully during its last execution window. This may result in missing data or delayed processing for dependent services. Please review the job logs and address the underlying error before the next scheduled run.
HIGH.reason: Cron job failure may result in missing data or delayed processing for dependent services, requiring immediate attention.

HIGH.subject: SSL certificate expiring soon
HIGH.body: An SSL certificate associated with your domain is set to expire within 14 days. Failure to renew the certificate before expiry will result in browser security warnings and potential service inaccessibility for your users. Please initiate the renewal process immediately.
HIGH.reason: The email is a security alert regarding an SSL certificate expiration, which may impact service inaccessibility for users.

HIGH.subject: Disk usage threshold reached
HIGH.body: One or more servers have reached the configured disk usage threshold of 85%. Continued growth in data volume without cleanup may result in service interruptions. Please review storage usage and take action to free up space or expand capacity as appropriate.
HIGH.reason: Server disk usage threshold reached, potentially leading to service interruptions

HIGH.subject: System anomaly detected
HIGH.body: An anomaly has been detected in system behavior that deviates from normal operational patterns. Our engineering team is currently investigating the issue to determine its cause and potential impact on running services. We will provide an update as soon as possible.
HIGH.reason: System anomaly detected, indicating potential disruption to services

HIGH.subject: Firewall triggered
HIGH.body: A firewall rule has been triggered due to suspicious request patterns detected in network traffic. The system has automatically blocked the affected requests to maintain security. No further action is required unless the alerts continue to appear at an elevated frequency.
HIGH.reason: The email indicates a security alert due to suspicious request patterns detected in network traffic, which requires immediate attention.

HIGH.subject: Traffic spike detected
HIGH.body: Our monitoring system has detected an unusual spike in incoming traffic across multiple services. This may indicate increased user activity or potential automated requests. We are currently analyzing the traffic source to ensure system stability and appropriate mitigation.
HIGH.reason: The email indicates an unusual spike in incoming traffic which may impact system stability, requiring immediate attention.

HIGH.subject: Bug escalation: critical path issue
HIGH.body: A critical bug has been identified in the main application flow that is causing failures for a segment of users. The issue has been escalated to the development team for immediate attention. Please pause non-critical tasks and prioritize a resolution to minimize user impact.
HIGH.reason: The email mentions a critical bug causing failures for a segment of users, indicating a client complaint or urgent issue.

HIGH.subject: Permission changes detected
HIGH.body: We detected changes to the permission settings on your account. If you made these changes intentionally, no action is required. If you did not authorize these modifications, please contact our security team immediately to investigate and revert unauthorized changes.
HIGH.reason: Security alert detected with potential unauthorized changes to account permission settings

HIGH.subject: Account locked due to suspicious activity
HIGH.body: Your account has been temporarily locked following multiple failed login attempts and suspicious activity signals. To restore access, please complete the identity verification process through our secure portal. Contact support if you need immediate assistance.
HIGH.reason: The email is a security alert indicating suspicious activity on the account, requiring immediate attention to restore access.

HIGH.subject: New login detected
HIGH.body: We detected a new login to your account from a device that has not been previously recognized. The login originated from a Windows device in a new location. If this activity was not initiated by you, we strongly recommend reviewing your account security settings immediately.
HIGH.reason: Security alert detected, indicating potential unauthorized access to the account.

MEDIUM.subject: Order on hold
MEDIUM.body: Your recent order has been placed on hold pending verification of your payment information. Our fraud prevention system flagged certain details for review. Please contact our customer support team with valid identification to expedite the review and release your order for processing.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is related to a payment issue with the customer's order being placed on hold pending verification of their payment information.

MEDIUM.subject: Scheduled callback confirmed
MEDIUM.body: A callback has been scheduled with our support specialist for the time you selected. Please ensure you are available at the agreed time and have any relevant information or account details ready. If you need to reschedule, please update your booking through the support portal.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a scheduled callback confirmation, indicating a customer support interaction, which is moderately important.

MEDIUM.subject: Ticket escalated to senior team
MEDIUM.body: Your support ticket has been escalated to our senior technical team for further investigation. This typically happens when an issue requires deeper expertise or access to specialized resources. We will keep you updated as progress is made on your case.
MEDIUM.reason: The email indicates that a support ticket has been escalated to the senior technical team, suggesting a client complaint or urgent customer request.

MEDIUM.subject: Request for additional information
MEDIUM.body: Our support team is reviewing your ticket and requires additional information to proceed with the investigation. Please provide the requested details by replying to this email or through the support portal. Providing accurate information will help us resolve your issue faster.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a response to a client's support ticket, requiring additional information to proceed with the investigation.

MEDIUM.subject: Ticket update: agent assigned
MEDIUM.body: An agent has been assigned to your open support ticket and is reviewing the details you provided. You can expect a response within the next few hours during business hours. If your issue is urgent, please let us know and we will escalate it accordingly.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a response to a client's open support ticket, indicating that an agent has been assigned to review the details and respond within a few hours.

MEDIUM.subject: Multiple failed logins
MEDIUM.body: We detected multiple failed login attempts within a short time window on your account. This behavior may indicate unauthorized access attempts. We recommend reviewing account security and enabling additional authentication layers if they are not already active on your account.
MEDIUM.reason: The email indicates suspicious account activity and recommends reviewing account security, which is a potential security alert.

MEDIUM.subject: Offer discussion invitation
MEDIUM.body: We are happy to inform you that we would like to proceed with an offer discussion. During this stage, we will go over role details, compensation structure, and expectations. Please let us know your availability for a discussion session at your earliest convenience.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is an invitation for an offer discussion, indicating a potential job opportunity and requiring a response from the recipient.

MEDIUM.subject: Interview scheduled
MEDIUM.body: We are pleased to inform you that your interview has been scheduled for next week. The session will include both technical and behavioral questions. Please confirm your availability so that we can finalize the arrangement and send you the meeting details.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a routine interview scheduling notification that requires a response to confirm availability.

MEDIUM.subject: Application shortlisted
MEDIUM.body: We are pleased to inform you that your application has been shortlisted for the next stage of our hiring process. Our team was impressed by your background and skills. You will soon receive details regarding the next assessment or interview round scheduled for your application.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a response to a job application and requires the recipient's attention for the next stage of the hiring process.

MEDIUM.subject: Security audit report available
MEDIUM.body: Your quarterly security audit report is now available in your account dashboard. The report highlights access patterns, flagged events, and security recommendations for your account. We encourage you to review it and apply any suggested improvements promptly.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a security audit report notification, which requires attention but is not urgent.

MEDIUM.subject: API key rotated
MEDIUM.body: Your API key has been successfully rotated as per your recent request. The old key has been invalidated and will no longer work for authentication. Please ensure all integrations and services using the previous key are updated with the new credentials immediately.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a security alert regarding API key rotation, which requires immediate action to update integrations and services.

MEDIUM.subject: Login from new location
MEDIUM.body: We detected a login attempt from a location that has not been previously associated with your account. For your protection, we recommend verifying this activity. If you recognize this login, no further action is needed on your end.
MEDIUM.reason: Security alert detected a suspicious login attempt from a new location, requiring verification to protect the account.

MEDIUM.subject: Two-factor authentication enabled
MEDIUM.body: Two-factor authentication has been successfully enabled on your account. This adds an additional layer of protection by requiring a verification code during login attempts. We strongly recommend keeping this feature enabled to enhance your account security.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a security alert from a legitimate service provider, AuthShield, informing the user about the enabling of two-factor authentication.

MEDIUM.subject: Suspicious login blocked
MEDIUM.body: Our security system has automatically blocked a suspicious login attempt to your account. The attempt was flagged due to unusual behavior patterns and mismatched authentication signals. No action is required unless you notice additional unauthorized activity on your account.
MEDIUM.reason: The email is a security alert from the account's security system, indicating a suspicious login attempt was blocked.

MEDIUM.subject: Password reset request
MEDIUM.body: A password reset request has been received for your account. If you initiated this request, you can proceed using the secure link provided. If you did not request this change, please ignore this message and consider updating your account security settings to prevent unauthorized access.
MEDIUM.reason: Security alert or suspicious account activity detected, requiring user action to verify password reset request.
